x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Participation of the account holder, borrower, or depositor in deciding or authorizing the rollover.

Comment:
Examples:
Borrower agrees to extend a short-term loan for another term.

Depositor authorizes a certificate of deposit (CD) to automatically renew at maturity.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Bank
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The bank or lenders role in initiating, approving, or executing the rollover.

Comment
Examples:
Bank proposes a rollover of a maturing loan under new interest terms.

Bank automatically rolls over a fixed deposit if the customer has opted in.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Compliance Party
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Oversight or approvals needed to ensure the rollover adheres to legal and regulatory requirements.

Comment:
Examples:
Central bank limits on rollover of loans in stressed sectors.

Mandatory reporting for rolled-over instruments.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Agent
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Other entities involved in processing or facilitating the rollover.

Comment:
Examples:
Payment processors for interest settlement during rollover.

Trustees or custodians for investment products.
